name: sse-heartbeat-honest-guard
title: SSE freeze: heartbeat cure + honest browser-path guard
description: Manual full-chain runs (TLC auto-retry; TLC->CC->RE) freeze the UI while the green E2E suite passes, because every spec asserts on backend truth (session_events/snapshot/psql) and has reload+fallback recovery a real browser lacks. Root cause: SSE stream emits no heartbeat/keepalive, so an idle connection behind the local 7890 proxy is reaped and native EventSource reconnect is slow/half-open -> frozen page. 05-27-sse-replay is already DONE (Last-Event-ID replay works on reconnect). Two independently-verifiable deliverables: (A) BE SSE heartbeat as the cure; (B) FE honest browser-path guard spec as the alarm. Constraint: test changes must not touch product code and vice versa.
creator: Drake
